title: taraxacum devexum
intro: Taraxacum devexum, also known as the upright dandelion or upright hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as a diuretic. Taraxacum devexum can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
